raw_consumer_statement:
Citibank is blatantly disregarding the terms of their own card agreement and practicing corrupt behavior as well as breaking the federal fair credit act. They are legally bound to the card agreement we agreed to upon card application but they have disobeyed the terms. 
A merchant has charged me for services they did NOT provide. I complained to Citi, the credit card provider, and to the merchant as well. The merchant agreed to credit me for lack of services. That refund never posted because Citi temporarily credited me for that complaint and at the time of the refund disbursement from the merchant the credit from Citi was still in effect. However, Citi subsequently rebilled my account stating they needed a credit slip from the merchant. I promptly submitted the credit slip where the merchant agreed to refund me but despite Citis promise in WRITING to credit me upon proof of the credit slip from the merchant they disobeyed their agreement and refused to credit me. Again the money is in Citibanks hands because they are the ones that billed me. Despite their written promise Citi outright disobeyed their own promise and completely reneged on their own terms of our card agreement. Whats worse is they simply ignore me and refuse to even dispute the charge. This rotten bank is taking blatant advantage of minority consumers they deem have no power against their big corporation.

This corruption and abuse of consumers must be investigated. Big banks can not continue to take advantage of minority consumers. I have a written agreement from the merchant promising the refund yet Citi refuses to return my own money and continues to bill me this amount. 
Please investigate and promptly refund my money.
